name: funnel-marketing
description: Two skills for funnel marketing & conversion copy: (1) funnel-builder — reverse-engineer a competitor's launch & distribution strategy in 4 phases (Discovery → Timeline → Funnel Mapping → Synthesis), grounded in 45,056 real Reddit conversations across 20 funnel subreddits; (2) psychology-triggers — apply 218 psychological sales/marketing triggers to outbound copy, landing pages, ad copy, sales scripts, and pitch decks.
